snippet.title: Michael S. Dell on Why Great Ideas are More Important Than Passion #shorts
snippet.description:
In this YouTube shorts video, Michael S. Dell, the founder of Dell Technologies, shares his insights on the importance of great ideas and why they matter more than following your passion. Dell talks about how his passion for computers and technology led him to start his own company, but it was his great idea that helped him achieve success.

Dell believes that while passion is important, it is not enough to guarantee success. He explains that having a great idea, backed by a solid business plan and the willingness to execute it, is what sets successful entrepreneurs apart from others. He also shares his own experience of how he turned his passion into a successful business by identifying a gap in the market and filling it with a unique product.

Throughout the video, Dell shares practical advice and tips for aspiring entrepreneurs looking to turn their great ideas into successful businesses. He emphasizes the importance of doing research, identifying a need, and building a product or service that meets that need. He also talks about the importance of adapting to changes in the market and being willing to pivot when necessary.

In this inspiring and informative YouTube shorts video, Michael S. Dell shares his experience and wisdom on how to turn great ideas into successful businesses. Whether you are an aspiring entrepreneur or simply interested in the world of business, this video is a must-watch.

snippet.title: PRICELESS ADVICE 4 - 50 I Michael Dell
snippet.description: Michael Dell is an American businessman and entrepreneur, best known as the founder and CEO of Dell Technologies, one of the world's largest technology companies. He started the company in 1984, while he was still a student at the University of Texas at Austin, by building and selling personal computers (PCs) directly to customers. This direct-to-consumer business model helped Dell to quickly grow the company and become a dominant player in the PC market. In addition to his role at Dell Technologies, Dell is also an active philanthropist and venture capitalist. He is considered one of the most successful entrepreneurs in the technology industry, with a net worth of over $40 billion as of 2021.

Dell's innovative approach to selling computers directly to consumers revolutionized the industry and helped make Dell a household name. In addition to his business accomplishments, Dell is known for his philanthropy and advocacy work, particularly in education and healthcare. His passion for technology and commitment to innovation have made him a leading figure in the tech industry and an inspiration to entrepreneurs around the world.

snippet.title: Michael Jackson's Son Prince Jackson Says Dad Had 'Insecurity' Over His Vitiligo #Short
snippet.description:
Prince Jackson is opening up about his late father, Michael Jackson’s struggles with his physical appearance. The 26-year-old was on a recent episode the "Hotboxin with Mike Tyson" podcast and spoke about Michael's vitiligo, a condition that causes the skin to lose color or pigmentation. "I think the cause of it is up for speculation, but it's either vitiligo or some form of lupus which contributed to the vitiligo," Prince said. He then got into detail about the impact the skin condition had on his dad's self-esteem. "He had a lot of insecurity around, kind of looking blotchy in his appearance," he said. "So he wanted to see if he could smooth out his appearance, to help with his security on his physical appearance." Michael died in June 2009, when Prince was 12 years old. While chatting Mike, the producer admitted he's still learning about his dad. "He was very interesting. Personally, I'm doing a lot of research on him and learning a lot about his story. And there's so much to cover," he said.

snippet.title: Cleanse Yourself of Negativity | Michael Singer | The Tony Robbins Podcast
snippet.description:
Clip from LET IT GO! Surrender to Happiness with Michael Singer | The Tony Robbins Podcast: https://youtu.be/E7TxEzMF3s8

MICHAEL A. SINGER is a spiritual teacher and #1 New York Times bestselling author of The Untethered Soul, The Surrender Experiment and the recent Living Untethered: Beyond the Human Predicament.  For over four decades, Michael has been passionately teaching spirituality and mindfulness.

Michael’s spiritual journey began in 1971.  While working on his doctorate in economics, Michael decided to go into seclusion to focus on yoga and meditation. It was in 1975 that Michael founded the Temple of the Universe, a now long-established yoga and meditation center where people of any religion or set of beliefs can come together to experience inner peace.

Singer is also a successful entrepreneur that has made major contributions in the areas of business, education, healthcare, and environmental protection.  He created a leading-edge software package that transformed the medical practice management industry, as well as the founding CEO of a billion-dollar public company whose achievements are archived in the Smithsonian Institution.

Tony and Sage Robbins are excited to share this special presentation from a 2022 private event with their Platinum Partners in Mexico.  Here, Michael teaches us the importance of surrender and how to “let go'' to remove the negative blocks inside us and allow positive emotions – like joy and happiness – to flow through us with grace and ease.

Tony Robbins is a #1 New York Times best-selling author, entrepreneur, and philanthropist. For more than 37 years, millions of people have enjoyed the warmth, humor and dynamic presentation of Mr. Robbins' corporate and personal development events. As the nation's #1 life and business strategist, he's called upon to consult and coach some of the world's finest athletes, entertainers, Fortune 500 CEOs, and even presidents of nations.

Singer is also a successful entrepreneur that has made major contributions in the areas of business, education, healthcare, and environmental protection.  He created a leading-edge software package that transformed the medical practice management industry, as well as the founding CEO of a billion-dollar public company whose achievements are archived in the Smithsonian Institution.

Tony and Sage Robbins are excited to share this special presentation from a 2022 private event with their Platinum Partners in Mexico.  Here, Michael teaches us the importance of surrender and how to “let go'' to remove the negative blocks inside us and allow positive emotions – like joy and happiness – to flow through us with grace and ease.

Tony Robbins is a #1 New York Times best-selling author, entrepreneur, and philanthropist. For more than 37 years, millions of people have enjoyed the warmth, humor and dynamic presentation of Mr. Robbins' corporate and personal development events. As the nation's #1 life and business strategist, he's called upon to consult and coach some of the world's finest athletes, entertainers, Fortune 500 CEOs, and even presidents of nations.
